scripts.gen:data: node scripts/sync-app-ui-assets.mjs && node scripts/gen-sentry-env.mjs && node scripts/sync-tradeoff-battle-access.mjs && node scripts/generate-practice-registry.mjs && node scripts/gen-data-version.mjs && node scripts/gen-showcase-stats.mjs && node scripts/gen-content-metadata.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs && node scripts/generate-prerender-routes.mjs && node scripts/prerender-sitemap-diff.mjs
scripts.gen:prerender: node scripts/sync-tradeoff-battle-access.mjs && node scripts/generate-practice-registry.mjs && node scripts/gen-content-metadata.mjs && node scripts/generate-prerender-routes.mjs
scripts.lint:questions:check: node scripts/sync-tradeoff-battle-access.mjs --check && node scripts/generate-practice-registry.mjs --check && node scripts/gen-showcase-stats.mjs --check && node scripts/gen-content-metadata.mjs --check && node scripts/gen-data-version.mjs --check && node scripts/lint-practice-registry.mjs && node scripts/lint-questions.mjs && node scripts/lint-incidents.mjs && node scripts/lint-tradeoff-battles.mjs && node scripts/validate-trivia-incident-balance.mjs && node scripts/validate-question-identities.mjs
scripts.lint:questions: node scripts/sync-tradeoff-battle-access.mjs && node scripts/generate-practice-registry.mjs && node scripts/gen-content-metadata.mjs && node scripts/lint-practice-registry.mjs && node scripts/lint-questions.mjs && node scripts/lint-incidents.mjs && node scripts/lint-tradeoff-battles.mjs && node scripts/validate-trivia-incident-balance.mjs && node scripts/validate-question-identities.mjs
scripts.lint:questions:fix: node scripts/sync-tradeoff-battle-access.mjs && node scripts/generate-practice-registry.mjs && node scripts/gen-content-metadata.mjs && node scripts/lint-practice-registry.mjs && node scripts/lint-questions.mjs --fix && node scripts/lint-incidents.mjs && node scripts/lint-tradeoff-battles.mjs && node scripts/validate-trivia-incident-balance.mjs && node scripts/validate-question-identities.mjs
scripts.start:prod: npm run gen:data && ng serve --configuration production
scripts.build:prod: npm run gen:data && ng build --configuration production
scripts.build: npm run gen:data && ng build --configuration production
scripts.build:analyze: ng build --configuration production --stats-json --source-map && npx source-map-explorer dist/frontendatlas/browser/*.js --summary
scripts.test: node scripts/gen-content-metadata.mjs && ng test --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless && node scripts/question-tags.test.mjs && node scripts/sitemap.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:critical: PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER=1 playwright test e2e/auth.spec.ts e2e/core-flows.spec.ts e2e/high-roi.spec.ts e2e/lemonsqueezy-integration.spec.ts e2e/filtering.spec.ts e2e/draft-versioning.spec.ts e2e/p1-regressions.spec.ts e2e/profile-password.spec.ts e2e/cv-linter-issues.spec.ts e2e/seo.spec.ts e2e/routing-and-access.spec.ts
scripts.verify:unit-and-content: npm run lint:content-drafts && npm run lint:guide-articles && npm run lint:guide-editorial-quality && npm run lint:shipped-draft-parity && npm run lint:questions:check && npm run test
scripts.verify:e2e-critical:all-browsers: npm run check:playwright-webkit-health && PLAYWRIGHT_ENABLE_WEBKIT=1 npm run test:e2e:critical
scripts.test:e2e:extended: PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER=1 playwright test e2e/header.mobile.spec.ts e2e/showcase.mobile-layout.spec.ts e2e/system-design.mobile-layout.spec.ts e2e/trivia.mobile-visual.spec.ts e2e/seo-ssr.spec.ts e2e/showcase.spec.ts e2e/trivia-tag-rendering.spec.ts
